message:
test(oracle): add 10 conformance test suites (379 total) covering VALUES, correlated subqueries, aggregates, joins, DML

New test suites: correlated WHERE subqueries, JOIN/USING/NATURAL, update
with subquery SET + REPLACE, correlated subquery with GROUP BY, aggregate
edge cases (total/empty/DISTINCT/text min-max), complex window patterns,
multi-join aggregate subquery, INSERT...SELECT transform, complex WHERE
expressions, advanced DML (DELETE with subquery).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
